name: Implement Architecture
description: Implement a model architecture with interface, tensor-shape, smoke-training, and baseline evidence.

inputs.description: Paper section, sketch, or natural language architecture request.
Optional reference implementation or model identifier.

permissions.description: Read public model code, docs, papers, and model cards.

approval_points.description: Run a GPU or long CPU smoke-training job.

phases.name: Requirements
phases.objective: Extract model purpose, inputs, outputs, constraints, and success checks.

phases.name: Shape Plan
phases.objective: Define module boundaries, tensor shapes, parameterization, and initialization assumptions.

phases.name: Minimal Implementation
phases.objective: Build the smallest usable architecture implementation consistent with local patterns.

phases.name: Tests
phases.objective: Add unit, shape, serialization, and deterministic forward-pass tests.

phases.name: Smoke Training
phases.objective: Run a minimal training loop and compare loss movement or sanity metrics.

phases.name: Report
phases.objective: Summarize implementation choices, shape guarantees, test evidence, and remaining risks.

required_outputs.description: Model purpose, constraints, and interface expectations.
Tensor shape and module interface plan.
Implemented files, public classes, and integration notes.
Unit and shape test command results.
Smoke run command, config, and exit status.

artifacts.description: Deterministic inputs for shape and forward-pass tests.

verifiers.description: Inputs, outputs, dtypes, and framework constraints are explicit.
Shape contract covers every public module boundary.
Implementation imports without side effects or missing dependencies.
Smoke-training metric or loss movement is recorded.
Final report claims cite code, tests, metrics, or run logs.
